policy.locked_test_policy: Any dataset inspected for tuning is consumed. New promotion requires a later unseen time window, newly collected longer history, or paper-only forward validation. Measurement-bug fixes may be rerun, but they do not reset hypothesis cleanliness.

definition.universe: KOSDAQ/Toss tradable symbols with cached 1d candles
definition.signal_day: volume >= 3x previous 20d average AND close > open
definition.entry: gap-aware stop/trigger fill on next trading day: if next open >= signal-day high, fill at next open; elif next intraday high >= signal-day high, fill at signal-day high; otherwise no fill
definition.exit: close after 3 trading days from entry day
definition.cooldown: same symbol cannot re-enter while horizon position is active

definition.universe: KOSDAQ/Toss tradable symbols with cached 1d candles
definition.trend: SMA20 > SMA60 AND signal close > SMA60
definition.pullback: at least 2 of the latest 3 closes are down AND low is within +1% of SMA20 AND close is not more than 3% below SMA20
definition.exit: close after 5 trading days from entry day
definition.cooldown: same symbol cannot re-enter while horizon position is active

definition.universe: KOSDAQ/Toss tradable symbols with cached 1d candles
definition.source_of_idea: Derived after VS_BREAKOUT_H3_V1 failed locked validation; therefore not cleanly pre-registered
definition.signal_day: volume >= 3x previous 20d average AND close > open
definition.measurement: research-only short/avoid proxy: next-open to close after 3 trading days, transformed as negative long raw return minus roundtrip cost
definition.entry: next trading day open for proxy measurement
definition.exit: close after 3 trading days from entry day
definition.cooldown: same symbol cannot re-enter while horizon position is active

definition.universe: KOSDAQ/Toss tradable symbols with cached 1d candles; broad cached symbols, not live orders
definition.market_regime: KOSDAQ close > SMA120 and KOSDAQ 20d return > -5%
definition.symbol_trend: signal close > SMA60 and SMA extension <= 20%
definition.volatility_filter: 20d daily close-return volatility <= 5% and 20d high-low range <= 35%
definition.entry: next trading day open; skip if next open gaps up more than 8% from signal close
definition.exit: conservative OHLC path: stop -6%, take +12%, otherwise close after 10 trading days; if stop and take both touched same day, assume stop first
definition.cooldown: same symbol cannot re-enter while horizon position is active

definition.source_of_idea: External ai-trader bounded sweep showed RsiBollingerBandsStrategy as the only modestly stable exploratory hint; this is not clean proof.
definition.signal: RSI14 <= 30 and close <= lower Bollinger Band(20, 2)
definition.market_guard: KOSDAQ 20d return >= -12% to avoid crash regimes
definition.volume_guard: signal volume <= 3x previous 20d avg to avoid distribution/volume shock extremes
definition.entry: next trading day open; skip if gap down < -10% or gap up > +8% from signal close
definition.exit: intraday stop -10%; otherwise exit next open after close >= BB mid or RSI14 >= 55; otherwise horizon 20 close
definition.cooldown: same symbol cannot re-enter for 20 trading days

hypotheses.name: RSI+Bollinger mean reversion with stricter KOSDAQ crash/high-vol guard

definition.source_of_idea: H20_V1 bad months correlate with KOSDAQ monthly return; corr(avg strategy month, KOSDAQ month return)=+0.587. Worst months were market drawdown/high-vol clusters.
definition.base_signal: RSI14 <= 30 and close <= lower Bollinger Band(20, 2)
definition.status_note: Post-hoc V2; same-history result is only a clue. Needs future/paper holdout.

hypotheses.name: RSI+Bollinger mean reversion with BB z-score and volume-shock guards

definition.source_of_idea: H20_V1 trade diagnostics: bb_z >= -2.5 was the best viable single post-hoc guard by locked average; high volume_multiple had worse removed-trade stats.
definition.base_signal: RSI14 <= 30 and close <= lower Bollinger Band(20,2)
definition.status_note: Post-hoc V3; same-history result can only suggest a future/paper holdout candidate.

hypotheses.description: No individual stock selection. Use KOSDAQ index regime features to decide whether broad long exposure is allowed, then evaluate H20/H60 forward index returns and daily cash-vs-index equity.

fixed_before_validation.cost_model: roundtrip 0.46%; equity exposure switch one-way cost 0.23%
fixed_before_validation.index_source: Naver Stock API domestic index KOSDAQ day chart

hypotheses.promotion_rule: Same-history pass is not live approval; freeze one gate and require future/no-send forward validation first.

hypotheses.description: Monthly top-20 KOSDAQ stock basket by 60d relative strength vs KOSDAQ, evaluated at 20d/60d against full eligible universe and KOSDAQ baseline with KR roundtrip cost.

fixed_before_validation.rebalance: first KOSDAQ trading day each month

hypotheses.latest_finding: Failed: top-N relative strength basket underperformed eligible universe and KOSDAQ in locked test; current symbol cache still has delisted-universe bias risk.

hypotheses.description: Positive news/filing-style catalyst keywords plus abnormal daily volume reaction, joined from cached news_context to cached daily candles; next-open entry and 3-trading-day exit, compared with same-date eligible universe baseline.

fixed_before_validation.signal: catalyst_score > 0 and event-day volume >= 1.5x previous 20d avg volume
fixed_before_validation.liquidity_filter: previous 20d avg turnover >= 50m KRW and close >= 1000 KRW
fixed_before_validation.entry_model: next trading day open after event date
fixed_before_validation.exit_model: close after 3 trading days from entry day
fixed_before_validation.baseline: same event date eligible universe average forward return

hypotheses.promotion_rule: Recent-news audit is no-send research only; promotion requires enough mapped historical events or forward paper observations.
hypotheses.latest_finding: After news dedupe and catalyst-query collection, current cache has 83 news rows, 44 mapped events, and 2 evaluable fixed signals. Same-history result is not promotable: locked-test has only 1 event with -13.46% net return and -9.82% excess vs same-date eligible universe; live_order_allowed remains false.
